payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and vertical orientation; image is dim/underexposed with the top slightly edge-cropped and the toe-kick visible at the bottom, photographed from approximately 0.7 m away.
